zh.Fingringhoe, Essex, England, United King: 英國英格蘭艾可分格林
zh.lifeSummary: 當Grace Makin於大約1578年出生在英國艾可分格林時，她的父親Tobias Makin31歲，母親Katherine Westbrome26歲。她於大約1598年與Edmund Sherman結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1643年6月14日之後在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托，埋葬在英國艾可迪德哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Grace Makin于大约1578年出生在英国艾可分格林时，她的父亲Tobias Makin31岁，母亲Katherine Westbrome26岁。她于大约1598年与Edmund Sherman结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1643年6月14日之后在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃特托，埋葬在英国艾可迪德哈姆。

nameMeanings.name: Makin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northwestern): from the Middle English personal name Maykin, a diminutive of May , a pet form of Mayhew (see Matthew ). Compare Makinson .
English (northwestern): nickname from Middle English maide + diminutive suffix -kin ‘little maid’, perhaps used in a derogatory sense.

variants.name: May
meanings: English: from the Middle English male personal name May, a pet form of Matthew (see Mayhew ).

English, Dutch, and German: from a personal name or nickname taken from the month of May (Middle English, Old French mai, Middle High German meie, from Latin Maius (mensis), from Maia, a minor Roman goddess of fertility). This name was sometimes bestowed on someone born or baptized in the month of May; it was also used to refer to someone of a sunny disposition, or who had some anecdotal connection with the month of May, such as owing a feudal obligation then. In England, this name was possibly also a pet form of Mary or Margaret. This surname is also found in France (Alsace and Lorraine) and Denmark.

variants.name: Meakin
meanings: English (mainly Nottinghamshire): variant of   Makin   1, 2, and 4.

variants.name: Makins
meanings: English: variant of Makin 1 and 2, with post-medieval excrescent -s. Compare Mackins .

nameMeanings.name: Grace
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the abstract noun (via Old French, from Latin gratia), this name occurs occasionally in the 15th century, and by the 1540s was among the most popular girls' names in some parishes. It has always been particularly popular in Scotland and northern England (borne, for example, by Grace Darling , the lighthouse keeper's daughter whose heroism in 1838 , saving sailors in a storm, caught the popular imagination). In more recent times it was famous as the name of the actress Grace Kelly ( 1928–82 ), who became Princess Grace of Monaco. In Ireland it is used as an Anglicized form of Gráinne .

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Grace Makin was born about 1578, in Fingringhoe, Essex, England, her father, Tobias Makin, was 31 and her mother, Katherine Westbrome, was 26. She married Edmund Sherman about 1598. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 5 daughters. She died after 14 June 1643, in Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, and was buried in Dedham, Essex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Grace Makin est née environ 1578, à Fingringhoe, Essex, Angleterre, son père, Tobias Makin, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Katherine Westbrome, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Edmund Sherman environ 1598. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée après 14 juin 1643, à Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, et a été enterrée à Dedham, Essex, Angleterre.

ko.lifeSummary: Grace Makin(이)가 대략 1578년 영국 에세스 핑그링호에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Tobias Makin(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Katherine Westbrome(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 대략 1598년 Edmund Sherman(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1643년 6월 14일 이후 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 왓르타운에서 사망했으며 영국 에세스 데드함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Grace Makin nasceu aproximadamente 1578, em Fingringhoe, Essex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Tobias Makin, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Katherine Westbrome, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Edmund Sherman aproximadamente 1598. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu após 14 de junho de 1643, em Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, e foi sepultada em Dedham, Essex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Grace Makin родилась около 1578 г. в местности фингрингхо, эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Tobias Makin было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Katherine Westbrome, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edmund Sherman около 1598 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла после 14 июнь 1643 г. в местности вэитиртоун, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика и была похоронена в местности дедхам, эссекс, Англия.

Se casó con Edmund Sherman aproximadamente 1598. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió después de 14 de junio de 1643, en Watertown, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, y fue sepultada en Dedham, Essex, Inglaterra.
